message: beads: add viz side-by-side compare tasks

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,12 @@
 {"id":"bd-24q.14.3","title":"Clustering: UI Panel + Timeline Highlight + Next/Prev Navigation","description":"Build the clustering UX:
- Cluster list with size, theme tags, and representative commit summary.
- Selecting a cluster highlights members on timeline/heat stripe and filters commit list; next/prev in cluster navigation buttons.
- URL state: selected cluster id and threshold params.
- Mobile: cluster list in sheet, with clear "next in cluster" CTA.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:13.178659379Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:13.178659379Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:13.178659379Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.14.4","title":"Clustering: Unit Tests (MinHash + Grouping Correctness)","description":"Unit tests:
- MinHash: synthetic sets with known Jaccard; assert estimator error within tolerance for chosen signature length.
- Determinism: same inputs produce same signatures/clusters (stable IDs).
- Grouping: synthetic diffs that should cluster together / apart; verify member sets.

Diagnostics
- Print signatures (first few hashes), similarity matrix slice, and resulting clusters on failure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:17.838077213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:17.838077213Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:17.838077213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.14.5","title":"Clustering: E2E Tests (Select Cluster + Next/Prev)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Open clustering panel; select top cluster -> timeline highlights appear and commit list filters.
- Use next/prev in cluster navigation; ensure selected commit remains within cluster membership.
- URL round-trip preserves selected cluster id + parameters.

Diagnostics
- Log selected cluster id, member count, and current commit hash after each navigation step.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:22.993879601Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:22.993879601Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.5","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:22.993879601Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.15","title":"Viz: Side-by-Side Markdown Panes (A vs B) + Synced Scroll","description":"Goal
- In A/B compare mode, add a side-by-side rendered markdown view (A on left, B on right) with synced scrolling and clear change cues. This is the fastest way to grok "what changed" while keeping the spec readable.

UX (Desktop)
- Two panes with a draggable divider; optional "sync scroll" toggle (on by default).
- Sync by headings/anchors when possible; fallback to proportional scroll.
- Hovering a heading path highlights the corresponding section in both panes.

UX (Mobile)
- Stacked/segmented control: A | B | Split (if landscape).
- Sync via "jump to same heading" rather than continuous scroll.

Implementation Notes
- Reuse reconstructed snapshots from A/B compare; avoid double recompute.
- Provide a robust mapping between A and B headings (by normalized heading text + path).

Acceptance Criteria
- Side-by-side mode is usable on large docs without jank.
- Heading jumps land at consistent corresponding sections.

Testing
- Unit tests for heading matching + scroll sync mapping.
- E2E: enable A/B, switch to side-by-side, scroll in A -> B follows; mobile A/B toggle works.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:34.505264248Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:34.505264248Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.15","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:34.505264248Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.15.1","title":"Side-by-Side: Two-Pane Layout + Divider + Sync Toggle","description":"Implement the core layout:
- Two scroll containers rendered concurrently; draggable divider; sync toggle; independent selection/highlighting.
- Preserve typography quality and code highlighting in both panes.
- Ensure virtualization isn't needed initially; keep perf acceptable via caching + worker.
- Add a "copy permalink" that includes A/B commit selection + view mode.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:45.353023946Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:45.353023946Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.15.1","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.15","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:45.353023946Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.15.2","title":"Side-by-Side: Heading Matching + Scroll Sync Algorithm","description":"Implement robust A<->B alignment:
- Normalize headings (case, punctuation) and use heading "path" (parent headings) to disambiguate duplicates.
- Scroll sync modes:
  - Anchor mode: keep nearest heading aligned between panes.
  - Proportional mode: fallback when anchor mapping missing.
- UX: show a small "linked" indicator when anchor sync is active; allow temporarily breaking sync while user scrolls quickly.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:49.974828396Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:49.974828396Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.15.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.15","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:49.974828396Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.15.3","title":"Side-by-Side: Mobile UX (A/B Tabs + Split in Landscape)","description":"Implement mobile-specific behavior:
- Default: segmented control A | B; preserve scroll position per pane.
- Landscape: allow split view; in portrait, offer "jump to same heading" CTA when switching panes.
- Ensure bottom dock does not overlap content; use safe-area insets.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:54.897246873Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:54.897246873Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.15.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.15","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:54.897246873Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.15.4","title":"Side-by-Side: Unit Tests (Heading Match + Scroll Sync)","description":"Unit tests:
- Heading matching: duplicates, renamed headings, moved sections; assert best-effort mapping and stable tie-breaking.
- Scroll sync: given outlines + scroll positions, assert target positions are monotone and do not oscillate.

Diagnostics
- Print mapped heading pairs and a few scroll sync steps on failure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:59.400821583Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:59.400821583Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.15.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.15","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:59.400821583Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.15.5","title":"Side-by-Side: E2E Tests (Split View + Sync + Mobile Tabs)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Desktop: enable A/B; open side-by-side; scroll left pane -> right follows; disable sync -> panes scroll independently.
- Mobile: switch A->B tab preserves scroll positions; "jump to same heading" works.

Diagnostics
- Log scrollTop values in both panes during sync and after mode toggles.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:07.124353623Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:07.124353623Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.15.5","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.15","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:50:07.124353623Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.2","title":"Viz: Heading Mini-Map + Changed-Section Highlighting","description":"Add a left-side (desktop) / slide-over (mobile) heading mini-map generated from the rendered markdown, with per-commit indicators for which headings changed. Clicking a heading scrolls the doc pane; diff view can auto-scroll to first change under that heading.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.3","title":"Viz: Shareable Permalinks (URL State) + Copy Link","description":"Encode visualization state in the URL (commit idx, tab, resolution, metric, bucket filters). Add a Copy Link button. Deep links should load without needing any server logic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.4","title":"Viz: Story Mode (Curated Milestones + Autoplay)","description":"Add an optional narrative layer: curated milestones (hand-picked commits) with short annotations and an autoplay scrubber. Desktop: right-side timeline card; Mobile: full-screen swipeable cards.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
